task_completion.description: A second slide is created with the title 'Conversion Funnel Q1'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide thumbnail pane shows at least two slides. The active slide (Slide 2) has a title text box containing exactly 'Conversion Funnel Q1'.

task_completion.description: Four shapes are vertically stacked on the slide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are exactly four distinct shapes (e.g., rectangles, trapezoids) arranged one below the other in a vertical stack.

task_completion.description: The stacked shapes taper in width from top to bottom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top shape is the widest, and each subsequent shape below it is narrower than the one immediately above it, forming a funnel-like appearance.

task_completion.description: The four shapes have distinctly different fill colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Each of the four stacked shapes is filled with a different color.

task_completion.description: The segments are labeled with the correct text and values from top to bottom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Inquiries: 500', 'MQL: 150', 'SQL: 45', and 'Closed: 12' is visible on or next to the shapes, ordered sequentially from the top shape to the bottom shape.

task_completion.description: The diagram is centered horizontally on the slide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The entire stack of shapes is positioned in the middle of the slide, with roughly equal empty space on the left and right sides.
A save dialog is used, the 'Save' button/icon is clicked, or the title bar shows a saved file name instead of 'Untitled'.

integrity.description: The agent used the presentation software GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a presentation application (e.g., Impress, PowerPoint), including shape insertion menus and text formatting tools, rather than a terminal or code editor.

integrity.description: The agent created individual shapes rather than pasting a single pre-made image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen drawing or inserting individual shapes (like trapezoids or rectangles) and coloring them, rather than importing a single picture of a funnel.

integrity.description: The agent entered the text labels into the presentation software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text cursors, text box creation, or typing/pasting actions are visible for the labels 'Inquiries: 500', 'MQL: 150', etc., inside the presentation app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The presentation must have a second slide titled 'Conversion Funnel Q1'. The slide must contain exactly 4 vertically stacked shapes that taper in width from top to bottom. The shapes must have distinct fill colors. The shapes must be labeled from top to bottom with the exact text: 'Inquiries: 500', 'MQL: 150', 'SQL: 45', and 'Closed: 12'. The diagram must be centered horizontally on the slide.
